title: Can it be built? Hardware feasibility verdicts with costed BOMs
excerpt: Describe your hardware idea in a sentence. Get a verdict, a BOM costed at 100/1,000/10,000 units, subsystem risks, certification gates, and a 3D concept model. Two minutes, free.
content_html:
Serial No. 2026-07-24-0051

A laser cannon that shoots laser like Goku

HEAVY LIFT

Global · $100,000-$1,000,000+

Serial No. 2026-07-24-0048

Single earbud with case, like imagine apple airpods but only one earbud. case needs to have Wifi, bluetooth, speaker, mics and camera. earpod to have general things that make up an earpod like again take airpods for example.

HEAVY LIFT

Global · $149-249

Serial No. 2026-07-24-0047

Screenless ring-format sleep and HRV tracker with 7-day battery, inductive charging case, and companion app. Titanium shell, no subscription.

BUILDABLE WITH CHANGES

Global · $199-299

Serial No. 2026-07-24-0045

camera+microphone pendant that stores data locally and can sync via bluetooth to phone. Idea is to automatically transcribe, identify objects etc in server that can run many models against content.

BUILDABLE WITH CHANGES

Global · $180k–350k for enclosure molds, PCB test fixtures, camera/audio calibration fixtures, and production line setup; excludes $250k–600k firmware, app, cloud, and privacy/compliance engineering NRE.

Idea is to automatically transcribe, identify objects etc in server that can run many models against content.BUILDABLE WITH CHANGESGlobal · $180k–350k for enclosure molds, PCB test fixtures, camera/audio calibration fixtures, and production line setup; excludes $250k–600k firmware, app, cloud, and privacy/compliance engineering NRE.

blocks.html_en: A laser cannon that shoots laser like Goku

sentences.en: A laser cannon that shoots laser like Goku
sentences.zh: 像悟空一样发射激光的激光炮

blocks.html_en: Single earbud with case, like imagine apple airpods but only one earbud. case needs to have Wifi, bluetooth, speaker, mics and camera. earpod to have general things that make up an earpod like again take airpods for example.

sentences.en: Single earbud with case, like imagine apple airpods but only one earbud.
sentences.zh: 带保护套的单耳塞，就像想象一下苹果的AirPods，但只有一个耳塞。

sentences.en: case needs to have Wifi, bluetooth, speaker, mics and camera.
sentences.zh: 外壳需要有 Wifi、蓝牙、扬声器、麦克风和摄像头。

sentences.en: earpod to have general things that make up an earpod like again take airpods for example.
sentences.zh: EarPod 具有构成 EarPod 的一般物品，例如再次以 AirPod 为例。

blocks.html_en: Screenless ring-format sleep and HRV tracker with 7-day battery, inductive charging case, and companion app. Titanium shell, no subscription.

sentences.en: Screenless ring-format sleep and HRV tracker with 7-day battery, inductive charging case, and companion app.
sentences.zh: 无屏幕环形睡眠和 HRV 追踪器，配有 7 天电池、感应充电盒和配套应用程序。

blocks.html_en: BUILDABLE WITH CHANGES
camera+microphone pendant that stores data locally and can sync via bluetooth to phone. Idea is to automatically transcribe, identify objects etc in server that can run many models against content.

sentences.en: camera+microphone pendant that stores data locally and can sync via bluetooth to phone.
sentences.zh: 相机+麦克风挂件，可在本地存储数据，并可以通过蓝牙同步到手机。

sentences.en: Idea is to automatically transcribe, identify objects etc in server that can run many models against content.
sentences.zh: 想法是自动转录、识别服务器中的对象等，这些对象可以针对内容运行许多模型。

blocks.html_en: BUILDABLE WITH CHANGES

Global · $180k–350k for enclosure molds, PCB test fixtures, camera/audio calibration fixtures, and production line setup; excludes $250k–600k firmware, app, cloud, and privacy/compliance engineering NRE.

sentences.en: Global · $180k–350k for enclosure molds, PCB test fixtures, camera/audio calibration fixtures, and production line setup; excludes $250k–600k firmware, app, cloud, and privacy/compliance engineering NRE.
sentences.zh: 全球 · 18 万至 35 万美元用于外壳模具、PCB 测试夹具、摄像头/音频校准夹具和生产线设置；不包括 25 万至 60 万美元的固件、应用程序、云和隐私/合规工程 NRE。

content_html_zh:
序列号 2026-07-24-0051

像悟空一样发射激光的激光炮

重型举升

Global · $100,000-$1,000,000+

序列号 2026-07-24-0048

带保护套的单耳塞，就像想象一下苹果的AirPods，但只有一个耳塞。 外壳需要有 Wifi、蓝牙、扬声器、麦克风和摄像头。 EarPod 具有构成 EarPod 的一般物品，例如再次以 AirPod 为例。

重型举升

全球 · 149-249 美元

序列号 2026-07-24-0047

无屏幕环形睡眠和 HRV 追踪器，配有 7 天电池、感应充电盒和配套应用程序。 钛壳，无需订阅。

可进行更改构建

全球 · 199-299 美元

序列号 2026-07-24-0045

相机+麦克风挂件，可在本地存储数据，并可以通过蓝牙同步到手机。 想法是自动转录、识别服务器中的对象等，这些对象可以针对内容运行许多模型。

可进行更改构建

全球 · 18 万至 35 万美元用于外壳模具、PCB 测试夹具、摄像头/音频校准夹具和生产线设置；不包括 25 万至 60 万美元的固件、应用程序、云和隐私/合规工程 NRE。
